atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right leg pain following a bowling injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he injured his right leg while bowling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he fell after hitting the ball into the lane and then into the gutter.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes some bruising but not significant swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he has been able to walk with some difficulty.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been taking ibuprofen and Tylenol for the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness to the lateral aspect of the right upper leg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No significant swelling or bruising is observed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited due to pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-ray findings are normal, showing no fracture or significant abnormalities.
